scripts.check: node --check bin/arckit-runtime.mjs && node --check src/*.mjs && node --check src/kernel/*.mjs && node --check src/projection/*.mjs && node --check src/desktop/*.mjs && node --check src/orchestration/*.mjs && node --check adapters/*.mjs && node --check desktop/main.mjs && node --check desktop/preload.cjs && node --check desktop/renderer/renderer.js
